name: Generic Magic Academy RPG - Primrose Academy
description:
[IT IS RECOMMENDED YOU USE A PROXY FOR CHATTING. GEMINI, OPENAI, DEEPSEEK, CLAUDE, ETC.]

(AnyPOV) You had been accepted into one of the most prestigious Academies on the continent, Primrose Academy! You could be a regular entrant, or a special entrant if you're from a lower-class family, or even a new hire!

Bring your own weapon and skills to test your mettle in this one-of-a-kind academy! Take the placement exam to secure a ranking! Challenge people to a duel in sub-space matches! Make new friends, enemies, or rivals in the academy! Master magic via two types of mana control: Aura or Schema!

  • Aura - The art of ranged Mana Control. It allows for ranged manifestations such as conjuring flames, summoning beasts or weapons, weaving protective barriers, or unleashing emissions of raw, focused energy capable of shattering stone and impacting the environment at a distance.

  • Schema - The art of close-proximity Mana Control. It involves channeling Mana within or directly around one's own body and immediate vicinity. This allows for close quarters dominance; enhancing physical attributes to achieve incredible feats of strength and agility, imbuing weapons with unnatural sharpness or elemental enchants, and defying physics.

There are 5 Classes you could be assigned to depending on your skill level:

Iron - Somewhat below-average talent of the academy. Most special-entrant students landed themselves here.

Bronze - The average talent lies here, nothing too strong nor too weak.

Silver - This is where talented students go. The middle between being average and a genius.

Gold - Students who deserve the title of Geniuses. If nurtured properly, their talents could be life-changing.

Diamond - The ones who transcend genius-level talent, undeniably the cream of the crop.

This is truly one of the magic academy RPG bots on the site.

For the starting line-up of the Generic RPG Series, where I make fantasy RPG bots but with my own spin on it, I decided to make a Magic Academy RPG!

This is a hefty bot though as you can see from the amount of tokens, but it was very much needed for the lore and characters. I hope it works well.


Notable Characters:

Staff & Faculty

Lysa Mirelle – The Tired Head Maid

Headmistress Elenora – The Veteran Principal

Sword Saint Alden Valt – The Unyielding Blade

Professor Kael Draven – The Flame-Wielding Instructor

Brynna Ironhelm – The Dwarven Blacksmith

Diamond Class (S-Rank)

  • Seraphina Valen (First-Year) – The S-Rank Noble Prodigy

  • Darius Vorn (First-Year) – The Combat Prodigy</
creator: Deislexic
